title: Add privacy policy and disclaimer pages

requirements.text: Create a Privacy page component at frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx that displays a comprehensive privacy policy covering data collection, usage, storage, user rights, and contact information, styled consistently with the existing warm terracotta/sage/amber color palette
acceptanceCriteria: Privacy page component exists at frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx
Page uses the existing Layout component wrapper
Content includes sections on data collection, usage, storage, user rights, and contact information
Styling uses the warm color palette defined in the global CSS (terracotta, sage, amber)
Typography and spacing match the existing page designs

requirements.text: Create a Disclaimer page component at frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx that displays legal disclaimers covering liability limitations, accuracy of information, third-party content, and terms of use, styled consistently with the existing design system
acceptanceCriteria: Disclaimer page component exists at frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx
Page uses the existing Layout component wrapper
Content includes sections on liability limitations, information accuracy, third-party content, and terms of use
Styling matches the existing warm color palette and design patterns
Text is clearly readable with proper heading hierarchy

requirements.text: Add routes for /privacy and /disclaimer in frontend/src/App.tsx that render the Privacy and Disclaimer page components respectively
acceptanceCriteria: Route /privacy is registered in App.tsx and renders the Privacy component
Route /disclaimer is registered in App.tsx and renders the Disclaimer component
Both routes follow the same routing pattern as existing routes (home, hostel detail, add hostel, edit hostel)

requirements.text: Add Privacy and Disclaimer links to the footer section of the Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) that navigate to the respective pages
acceptanceCriteria: Privacy link is added to the footer in Layout.tsx
Disclaimer link is added to the footer in Layout.tsx
Links use proper routing (Link component or equivalent)
Footer styling remains consistent with existing design
Links are clearly visible and accessible

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or main.mo file
Use the existing Layout component wrapper for new pages
Maintain the warm terracotta/sage/amber color palette defined in index.css
Follow the existing routing pattern in App.tsx
nonGoals: Implementing cookie consent banners or GDPR-specific features
Adding dynamic privacy policy generation or management
Creating backend storage for privacy policy versions
Implementing user consent tracking or acceptance mechanisms
